name: Mighty Plus Case
summary: The Storz & Bickel Mighty Plus Case provides secure and stylish transport for the MIGHTY(+) device and its accessories.
description: The Storz & Bickel Mighty Plus Case provides secure and stylish transport for the MIGHTY(+) device and its accessories. Its durable hard shell offers unbeatable protection against damage while the odour-proof design ensures security during any journey. The spacious interior can also accommodate additional items like Dosing Capsules, making it the ideal storage solution for all types of travellers looking for a peaceful journey. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
